title: Eluxadoline bulk — Chapter 29 at 6% MFN (same-letter form gate)
source: CROSS NY N302614 (15 Feb 2019) — Eluxadoline bulk → 2933.29.2000, 6% ad valorem; not listed in Pharmaceutical Appendix. Same letter also classifies Viberzi tablets under 3004 Free.

value_note.contrast: Same letter: Viberzi tablets → 3004.90.9260 Free. Real base-MFN delta on one CROSS page — preference/appendix may still erase by origin; cite base MFN, not guaranteed savings
